prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年复旦大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约72名、56名、115名、45名、105名，整体波动较大，近两年呈现先升后降再升的震荡走势；2025年基 准位次约105名；该校在海南省综合类招生计划2021–2023年均为8人，2024年缩减至5人，2025年回升至7人；2026年计划招生8人，较2025年增加1人 ，小幅扩招约14.3%，对竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年稳定位列第5名，属于全国顶尖高校层 次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面（主要涉及师德师风与学校管理事件），但2025年周期评价偏正面（科研成果荣誉）；抖音学校热 度总排名第4（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度维持高位；历史投档异常信号2023年为高关注，但主要涉及其他省份，海南未见明显断档记录；复旦大学 拥有A+学科11个（中国史、中国语言文学、哲学、政治学、数学、新闻传播学、物理学、理论经济学、生物学、马克思主义理论、公共卫生与预防医学），A类学科27个，学科实 力顶尖，对考生报考有强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、临床医学等专业社会热度持续高热；新闻传播学明显劝退；海南省2026年高考考生总数约7 8000人，较2025年67408人增长约15.7%，竞争加剧；复旦大学位于上海市（非本省），在海南省招生占比极小（约0.7%–1 %），跨省报考的地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次105名、2026年小幅扩招（7→8人）缓解竞争、海南省考生总数大幅增长（+15.7%）加剧竞争、 抖音高热维持报考关注度、声誉偏负面但影响有限等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年略有后移；预测最低位次约120名，位次区间70–170名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班（含相辉计划、香农计划等）
- 经济学类
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 人文科学试验班（含中国语言文学类、历史学类、哲学类、法学、新闻传播学类等）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 暂无
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间70–170名内，建议以二档人文科学试验班为主攻方向、一档理科试验班和经济学类为冲刺目标；位次明显优于区间下限（如70名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（170名左右）需谨慎评估，可考虑以二档保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Fudan University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 72, 56, 115, 45, and 105, showing significant fluctuations with a recent oscillating trend of first rising, then falling, then rising again; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 105; the enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Hainan Province was 8 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 5 in 2024, and rebounded to 7 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 8 students, an increase of 1 from 2025, a small expansion of about 14.3%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, consistently ranked 5th in the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top tier of national universities, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative (mainly related to teacher ethics and school management incidents), but the 2025 cycle evaluation is slightly positive (scientific research achievements and honors); Douyin school popularity total ranking is 4th (high heat), with high short video exposure, maintaining high application attention; historical abnormal admission signals in 2023 were high attention, but mainly involved other provinces, with no obvious gaps recorded in Hainan; Fudan University has 11 A+ disciplines (Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Philosophy, Political Science, Mathematics, Journalism and Communication, Physics, Theoretical Economics, Biology, Marxist Theory, Public Health and Preventive Medicine), and 27 A-class disciplines, with top-tier academic strength, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Clinical Medicine continue to have high social popularity; Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; the total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Hainan Province is about 78,000, an increase of about 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025, intensifying competition; Fudan University is located in Shanghai (not in this province), with a very small enrollment proportion in Hainan (about 0.7%–1%), and the regional preference for cross-province applications has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 105, the small expansion in 2026 (7→8 students) easing competition, the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Hainan Province (+15.7%) intensifying competition, high Douyin heat maintaining application attention, and the slightly negative reputation with limited impact, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 120, with a ranking range of 70–170.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (including Xianghui Plan, Shannon Plan, etc.)
- Economics Class
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class (including Chinese Language and Literature, History, Philosophy, Law, Journalism and Communication, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- None currently
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 70–170, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class as the main direction, with Tier 1 Science Experimental Class and Economics Class as reach goals; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 70), one can focus on impacting Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 170), careful evaluation is needed, and Tier 2 can be considered as a safety option.
